task_completion.description: Open the calendar event creation form in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calendar view or an event creation modal/form is visible in the Odoo web interface.
The text 'Weekly Sales Standup' is entered into the event title or subject input field.

task_completion.description: Set the meeting time to 09:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time for the event is explicitly set to '09:00' or '09:00 AM' in the time selection dropdown or input field.

task_completion.description: Set the event to repeat weekly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Recurrent' or 'Repeat' checkbox is checked, and the recurrence frequency is set to 'Weekly' or '1 Week(s)' in the recurrence options.
The text 'Review pipeline progress and blockers.' is entered into the description or notes text area of the event form.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to create the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Odoo interface, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts making API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo Calendar application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows localhost:8069 (or similar local Odoo address) and standard Odoo navigation menus/UI elements are visible, not a generic text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply paste the expected output into a single unrelated file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for subject, time, recurrence, and description are placed in their respective, distinct fields within the Odoo event creation form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a calendar event in a local Odoo CRM instance (localhost:8069). Verified expected values: Subject must be exactly 'Weekly Sales Standup'. Time must be 09:00:00 (09:00 AM). Recurrence must be set to WEEKLY. Description must contain the keywords 'pipeline' and 'blocker' (specifically 'Review pipeline progress and blockers.').
